emails.subject: Meeting with Dr. Michael Johnson
emails.body: Hi Bob, I have a meeting scheduled with Dr. Michael Johnson on March 15th at 2 PM. His office is located at 456 Medical Center Drive, Los Angeles, CA 90210. You can reach him at (555) 987-6543 or email him at mjohnson@medical.com. Please prepare the quarterly report for our discussion.

emails.subject: Client Information - Maria Rodriguez
emails.body: Team, I wanted to share information about our new client Maria Rodriguez. Her contact details are: Email: maria.rodriguez@clientcorp.com, Phone: +1-555-321-0987, Address: 789 Business Ave, Miami, FL 33101. She's interested in our premium package. Please reach out to her directly.

emails.subject: Payment Processing - Account #1234-5678-9012-3456
emails.body: James, I need you to process a payment for account number 1234-5678-9012-3456. The account holder is James Brown, contact email: james.brown@company.com, phone: (555) 456-7890. The billing address is 321 Oak Street, Chicago, IL 60601. Please confirm the payment has been processed.
